reviews.comment:
Malisima atencion de los playeros. Atienden sin ganas y si no funciona la app de mercado pago y no tenes efectivo amenanzan que te sacan el combustible del auto,siendo error de ellos que deben avisar que no esta disponible el pago por ese  medio o poner un cartel como la gente No una servilleta que dice No! Pegado en la maquina,todos trabajan con malestar asia los clientes,NO VAMOS A QUE NOS REGALEN NADA!!! HICE RECLAMOS Y NO VEO CAMBIOS SIENORE LA MISMA GENTE...son un desastre prepotentes gracias a nosotros comen ratas😡😤

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the gas station attendants. They serve without enthusiasm, and if the Mercado Pago app isn't working and you don't have cash, they threaten to drain the fuel from your car, which is their mistake. They should warn customers that payment through that method isn't available or put up a proper sign, not a napkin that says "No!" stuck to the pump. Everyone works with a bad attitude towards customers. WE DON'T GO THERE TO GET FREE THINGS!!! I'VE COMPLAINED AND I SEE NO CHANGE, IT'S ALWAYS THE SAME PEOPLE... they're a disgrace, arrogant, and thanks to us, they're eating rats! 😡😤
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNnZDeGVnEAE
